title: tengine.session.start v1
description: Fires at silo bind, before the first frame. Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle SESSION_START in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. Marks the boundary between session-dir creation and the first GPU frame; consumers should pair with a later tengine.session.stop on the same source URI.

silo.description: silo identifier as configured (e.g. 'Racing', 'Fluid'). Case is preserved from the silo config.

session_dir.description: absolute path to the session directory under ~/.tengine/sessions/silo_*/. Basename of this path matches the session_id used in tengine.silo.started.

sock.description: absolute path to the silo's IPC unix-domain socket; clients connect here to drive the shadergen REPL.
